{{Infobox character
| name = Overlord Eli
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Eli will protect the [[Asphodel Incarnation]] alongside Denner.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Overlord Eli]] has defenses that [[Grandmaster Asphodel]]'s team bypassed.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Overlord Eli]] has an estate in [[Abdera]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
